original: He watches you, looking more sad than anything. Then shakes his head.
translated: Il vous observe, l'air plus triste que tout. Puis secoue la tête.

original: "Ha, yes. So it could be." He doesn't sound convinced, but carries on. "Betrayal in another form, perhaps?"
translated: "Ha, oui. C'est possible." Il n'a pas l'air convaincu, mais continue. "Une trahison sous une autre forme, peut-être ?"

original: His eyes go wide, and his arm grabs at the side of his desk, pulling him to a more formal sitting position.
translated: Ses yeux s'écarquillent, et son bras agrippe le bord de son bureau, le tirant vers une position assise plus formelle.

original: "What do you know of Ulmus Pond?" he asks fiercely.
translated: "Que savez-vous d'Ulmus Pond ?" demande-t-il avec véhémence.

original: "What do you know of Ulmus Pond?" he asks fiercely.
translated: "Que savez-vous d'Ulmus Pond ?" demande-t-il avec véhémence.

original: A long pause. "Have you heard from Ulmus?" he asks. "Ulmus Pond. You recall him, surely."
translated: Un long silence. "Avez-vous eu des nouvelles d'Ulmus ?" demande-t-il. "Ulmus Pond. Vous vous souvenez de lui, certainement."

option_line: bffi_menesPPpondB:"He's dead. On Chalcedon. A Pather called Sedge shot him."
original: He's dead. On Chalcedon. A Pather called Sedge shot him.
translated: Il est mort. Sur Chalcedon. Un Sentieriste nommé Sedge lui a tiré dessus.

option_line: bffi_menesPPpondC:"I caught him. He promised to confess everything to you."
original: I caught him. He promised to confess everything to you.
translated: Je l'ai attrapé. Il a promis de tout vous avouer.

option_line: bffi_menesPPpondD:"I caught him on Chalcedon. He sold you a fake relic. The Knights hold him now."
original: I caught him on Chalcedon. He sold you a fake relic. The Knights hold him now.
translated: Je l'ai attrapé sur Chalcedon. Il vous a vendu une fausse relique. Les Chevaliers le détiennent maintenant.

option_line: bffi_menesPPpondE:"I caught him on Chalcedon. He sold you a fake relic. The Path has him now."
original: I caught him on Chalcedon. He sold you a fake relic. The Path has him now.
translated: Je l'ai attrapé sur Chalcedon. Il vous a vendu une fausse relique. Le Sentier le détient maintenant.
